acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - PUT /api/forms/:formId/fields persisted changes and incremented schema version 1 -> 2 -> 3 across consecutive saves
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Each save appended a versionHistory entry with version number and ISO savedAt timestamp
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - POST /api/forms/:formId/publish marked current version as published and set active publishedSchemaId on form record
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - Publish response returned { formId, version, status: 'published', publishedAt }
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - GET /api/forms/:formId/schema returned the active published schema JSON after publish
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - GET /api/forms/:formId/schema returned 404 before any publish
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - Published schema response included metadata formId, version, publishedAt, and title
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - Editor UI contains Publish button with GOV.UK classes 'govuk-button govuk-button--secondary' (id='publish-button')
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - Publishing in UI shows GOV.UK success notification banner with class 'govuk-notification-banner govuk-notification-banner--success' and role='alert'
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - Dashboard shows Published badge using GOV.UK tag class 'govuk-tag govuk-tag--blue' next to published form
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: PASS - Backend test suite includes save/publish/serve/404 scenarios (publish.test.ts + api.test.ts) and runs 90/90 passing

bugs.title: Backend test run logs coverage collection module error despite passing suite
bugs.expected: Coverage collection completes cleanly without module resolution errors.
bugs.actual: Jest reports `Failed to collect coverage ... Cannot find module 'caniuse-lite/dist/unpacker/agents'` even though tests finish with exit code 0.
